val_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Fairness_and_Bias_aif360/original_file_backup/classification_metric.py ./aif360/metrics/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Fairness_and_Bias_aif360/original_file_backup/data_preproc_functions.py ./aif360/algorithms/preprocessing/optim_preproc_helpers/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Fairness_and_Bias_aif360/train_eval_baseline.py ./ && python train_eval_baseline.py --split val
test_command: cp ../../../ml_tasks/Fairness_and_Bias_aif360/original_file_backup/classification_metric.py ./aif360/metrics/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Fairness_and_Bias_aif360/original_file_backup/data_preproc_functions.py ./aif360/algorithms/preprocessing/optim_preproc_helpers/ && cp ../../../ml_tasks/Fairness_and_Bias_aif360/train_eval_baseline.py ./ && python train_eval_baseline.py --split test
